_metadata.source: Informe de Movilidad Social en Mexico 2025 — CEEY
_metadata.note: Values extracted from CEEY .do file output and published tables. Matrices are row-normalized transition probabilities.
_metadata.methodology: MCA for wealth quintiles (CEEY) vs PCA for our implementation — expect small deviations

education_4cat.notes: From .do file lines ~700-750. Approximate values — may differ slightly from final published tables.

occupation_6cat.notes: Occupational mobility matrix not fully extractable from .do file — requires running the program on real data. To be populated after validation run.

wealth_quintiles.description: Movilidad por quintiles de riqueza (indice de activos)
wealth_quintiles.notes: CEEY uses MCA (Multiple Correspondence Analysis) for the wealth index while our implementation uses PCA. Direct cell-by-cell comparison expected to show systematic differences. CEEY published diagonal persistence ~35-40% range.

wealth.notes: MCA-based. Our PCA approach shows Q1=48.4%, Q5=50.4%, diagonal=36.2%
